title: Give customers access to billing portal
description: Create a billing portal session to allow customers to manage their billing and subscription information.

steps.title: Set up customer
steps.description: Create a customer who will access the billing portal.

nodes.title: Create customer
nodes.description: Create a new customer to associate with the payment or subscription.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Create billing portal session
steps.description: Generate a session URL that gives your customer access to the billing portal.

nodes.title: Create billing portal session
nodes.description: Create a billing portal session to allow customers to manage their subscriptions.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Redirect to billing portal
steps.description: Open the billing portal URL to see what your customer will experience.

nodes.title: Open billing portal
nodes.description: Click the link below to open the billing portal in a new tab.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.
